pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_qgis.sh (lines 89-101) which generates sample_points.geojson at this exact path
Code analysis of task.json, setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and README.md all reference this exact output path
Code analysis of setup_qgis.sh (lines 89-100) which defines 3 point features: Point A (-122.4, 37.6), Point B (-122.3, 37.7), Point C (-122.1, 37.65)

Task description states 'Verify the output contains 3 polygon features (one buffer per point)' and README.md confirms '3 polygon features (one buffer per point)'. This is derived from the 3 input points.
Task description line 4 states 'Set the distance to 500 (meters, since EPSG:3857 uses meters)' and README.md section 'Target Data' states 'Buffer distance: 500 meters'

privileged_info_summary: The buffer_analysis_and_export task uses synthetic GeoJSON data generated by the environment setup script. The source data (sample_points.geojson) contains 3 point features with coordinates in WGS84 (EPSG:4326): Point A at [-122.4, 37.6], Point B at [-122.3, 37.7], and Point C at [-122.1, 37.65]. The task requires buffering these 3 points with a distance of 500 meters (after reprojecting to EPSG:3857) and exporting the resulting 3 polygon features to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/point_buffers.geojson in WGS84 format.
